codeReview.summary: TTS settings backend implementation is complete and correct. AppSettings interface includes ttsVoice, ttsRate, ttsPitch. GET /api/settings returns TTS settings with defaults. PUT /api/settings validates TTS settings properly. All validation ranges match requirements.

summary: Backend TTS settings implementation verified: 6 curated voices defined, rate range -50% to +100%, pitch range -50Hz to +50Hz. API validation returns 400 for invalid inputs. Tests added for all TTS settings functionality.
